machine.name: Community Services Courts Diversion And Victim Services Fine Fee Relief Triage
machine.description: Community-services machine for fine fee relief triage in the courts diversion and victim services workstream. It monitors ability to pay, court balance, hardship proof, and relief pathway and emits AI-triggered actions for health and human services, law enforcement/public safety coordination, homelessness response, and city operations.

Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for fine fee relief triage.
Create field work order or mobile team task for fine fee relief triage.
Maintain monitored service path for fine fee relief triage.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map 311, case-management, CAD/RMS, shelter HMIS, benefit enrollment, outreach, public health, and transit-access signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to case workers, mobile crisis, public safety, housing navigators, field crews, transportation dispatch, or health-service agents.
